div.head: The Secretary of State to the Minister in Haiti (Gordon)
div.p: 56. Your despatch No. 17 of September 23.Not printed. Unless you perceive objection please call on the President and say to him that following your conference with him on September 7 you of course reported to your Government his promise to furnish you with a copy of the letter supplementary to the contract regarding the deposit of funds for retirement of the 1922 bonds, as well as copies of the other documents which may exist in connection with the Debachy contract; that your Government has now cabled you that it has been awaiting with obvious interest the receipt of these documents and that it is somewhat at a loss to understand why it has not yet received the documents.
